info.title: MICROSERVICE_DEV_Transaction Processing API
info.description: The Transaction Processing API facilitates the creation and management of financial transactions within the application. This endpoint allows users to initiate new transactions, which can include purchases, transfers, or refunds. It is primarily utilized by finance teams and integrated systems that require real-time transaction processing. By ensuring efficient and reliable transaction creation, this API supports the overall financial operations of the business.

post.description: This endpoint allows you to create a new transaction in the system. You must provide the necessary transaction details in the request body.

requestBody.description: This request body accepts transaction data for processing. It should include the necessary fields according to the specified schema, allowing for the creation or modification of transaction records.

200.description: The transaction was processed successfully and the response includes the transaction details.

500.description: An unexpected error occurred on the server while processing the request.

404.description: The requested transaction resource could not be found.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Creat.title: Transaction Response

transactionId.description: The unique identifier for the transaction.

customerId.description: The unique identifier for the customer associated with the transaction.

accountNumber.description: The account number from which the transaction was made.

transactionType.description: The type of the transaction (e.g., credit, debit).

amount.description: The amount involved in the transaction.

currency.description: The currency of the transaction amount (e.g., USD, EUR).

status.description: The current status of the transaction (e.g., pending, completed).

message.description: A message providing additional information about the transaction.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Creat.description: A response schema representing the details of a transaction.

timestamp.description: The timestamp when the error occurred.

status.description: Indicates the success or failure of the operation.

error.description: The type of error that occurred.

message.description: A human-readable message providing more context about the error.
message.example: Unable to process financial transaction due to internal service failure.

path.description: The request path that was called which resulted in the error.

trace.description: A stack trace or more details related to the error for debugging purposes.

suggestion.description: A suggested action to resolve the issue.
suggestion.example: Please retry after some time or contact support if the issue persists.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Creat.description: Schema representing the response structure for a 500 Internal Server Error in transaction operations.

example.message: Unable to process financial transaction due to internal service failure.

details.message: Payment gateway timeout while processing transaction request.

example.suggestion: Please retry after some time or contact support if the issue persists.

accountNumber.description: The account number related to the error.

errorCode.description: The specific error code associated with the error.

message.description: A message providing additional details about the error.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Error.description: Detailed information about the error encountered.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Creat.title: Transaction Request Body

customerId.description: The unique identifier of the customer initiating the transaction.

accountNumber.description: The account number from which the transaction will be executed.

amount.description: The amount of money to be transferred in the transaction.

currency.description: The currency in which the transaction amount is specified (e.g., 'USD', 'EUR').

beneficiaryAccount.description: The account number of the beneficiary who will receive the funds.

transactionDate.description: The date when the transaction is initiated, formatted as an ISO 8601 date string.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Creat.description: The request body for creating a new transaction operation. It contains essential information about the transaction being initiated.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Creat.title: Transaction Operations Error Response

timestamp.description: The timestamp of when the error occurred.

status.description: Indicates whether the operation was successful or not.

error.description: A short description of the error.

message.description: Detailed error message explaining the reason for the failure.
message.example: Source account details not found for transaction processing.

path.description: The URI path that was requested.

trace.description: A trace of the error occurrence, useful for debugging.

suggestion.description: Suggestions for solving the error or next steps.
suggestion.example: Verify account details and retry the transaction.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Creat.description: Represents the response structure for a 404 error from transaction operations.

example.message: Source account details not found for transaction processing.

details.message: No active account exists for the provided account number.

example.suggestion: Verify account details and retry the transaction.

environment.name: environment
environment.description: Environment used to select the workflow branch.

serviceCategory.name: serviceCategory
serviceCategory.description: Service category used to select the workflow branch.
